tasks.label: Build All Blockchain Components
args: C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe core.cpp -o core.exe -I"C:/msys64/mingw64/include" -L"C:/msys64/mingw64/lib" -static -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -lssl -lcrypto -lws2_32 -lgdi32 -lcrypt32 && C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe admin.cpp -o admin.exe -I"C:/msys64/mingw64/include" -L"C:/msys64/mingw64/lib" -static -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -lssl -lcrypto -lws2_32 -lgdi32 -lcrypt32 && C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe agent.cpp -o agent.exe -I"C:/msys64/mingw64/include" -L"C:/msys64/mingw64/lib" -static -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -lssl -lcrypto -lws2_32 -lgdi32 -lcrypt32 && C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe voter.cpp -o voter.exe -I"C:/msys64/mingw64/include" -L"C:/msys64/mingw64/lib" -static -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -lssl -lcrypto -lws2_32 -lgdi32 -lcrypt32
